user.title: TCL Intelligent AC
user.description: Choose how to add TCL Intelligent AC devices for local LAN control.

cloud.title: Intelligent AC account
cloud.description: Log in once to fetch device MAC addresses and keys. The password is not stored.

manual.title: Manual LAN setup
manual.description: Add a TCL Intelligent AC device for local LAN control.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the device with these details.
error.cloud_error: Could not log in or fetch devices from Intelligent AC. Check the Home Assistant log for the exact cloud response.
error.invalid_auth: The Intelligent AC login service rejected these credentials.
error.too_many_attempts: The Intelligent AC login service temporarily blocked login attempts. Wait a while and try again.
error.host_not_found: The device was found in the account, but its LAN host could not be resolved.
error.no_devices: No supported TCL AC devices were found in this account.
